image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S045. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Lin Che falls to his knees on the floor.; Memories flood into him like cold water, overwhelming him.; He realizes he once locked his mother in the basement to keep her from leaving. narration intent: Narrator explains "林澈跪在地上，记忆像冷水灌进胸口。他曾经为了留住母亲，犯下不可逆的错。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "我不是故意的。". shot positive notes: Close-up of a man kneeling on a kitchen floor, anguish on his face, cold blue lighting, tears, dramatic shadows, emotional climax.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S045. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Lin Che falls to his knees on the floor.; Memories flood into him like cold water, overwhelming him.; He realizes he once locked his mother in the basement to keep her from leaving. narration intent: Narrator explains "林澈跪在地上，记忆像冷水灌进胸口。他曾经为了留住母亲，犯下不可逆的错。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "我不是故意的。". shot positive notes: Close-up of a man kneeling on a kitchen floor, anguish on his face, cold blue lighting, tears, dramatic shadows, emotional climax.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, extra characters, bright colors, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 林澈跪在地上，记忆像冷水灌进胸口。他曾经为了留住母亲，犯下不可逆的错。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
